package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormChainBuiltInService() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_chain_built_in_service"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Services that own detailed ORM query shape instead of delegating to repositories."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
